IntellMeet

IntellMeet is a meeting workspace for live collaboration, AI summaries, searchable transcripts, action items, and team workspaces.

Public pages
- /

Key concepts
- Meeting collaboration
- AI summaries
- Action items
- Searchable transcripts
- Team analytics
- Private workspace routes

Machine-readable notes
- The homepage is server-rendered and static-first.
- Realtime, media, analytics, and editor systems are isolated behind app routes.
- Robots disallow private workspace and API paths.
